name: Carrot and Watering Can Duo Easter Decorative Felt Figural - Spritz™
description:
Brighten up your Easter decor with the Carrot and Watering Can Duo Easter Decorative Felt Figural - Spritz™. Crafted from polyester, these charming felt figurines add a playful touch to any indoor setting. Standing at a maximum height of 5.25 inches, they are perfect for tabletops or shelves. The multicolored design brings a cheerful vibe, making them a delightful addition to your seasonal decorations. Enjoy the whimsical theme that celebrates your favorite characters.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
